subcodes.first_line: Give thanks that thou wert not present on this journey with the Ancient Beauty. By God, the Truth! The heavens wept and the earth lamented [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شکر کن که در این سفر مع جمال قدم نبودی تالله الحق آسمان گریست و زمین نوحه نمود
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @courtesy; culture [adab]
